sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68389" key="molubdoxoi/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολυβδο-χοΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n68389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">work in molten lead</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">171</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
